overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character navigating through a futuristic urban environment. The journey begins in a plaza, ascends stairs, passes through an alley with vending machines, traverses a tent encampment, moves through a dark underpass, and emerges onto a busy street with vehicles and pedestrians.

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs from the plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking up a wide flight of concrete stairs between modern buildings

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket walking ahead up the stairs

entered.detail: tall silver metal security fence with vertical bars
wide flight of concrete stairs with solid side walls
modern building with teal-colored facade and large windows
multi-story building with reflective glass exterior

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an urban plaza with the camera ascending a wide concrete stairway. A metal fence lines the left side while modern buildings flank both sides. A pedestrian in a green jacket is visible ahead on the stairs. The environment is bright and sunny with clear visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley with vending machines

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters a narrow alleyway
passing green and black vending machines lining the right wall

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow alley between tall buildings, passing vending machines

entered.detail: row of illuminated vending machines with green and black coloring
tall building with distinctive red and white facade

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the scene transitions to a narrow enclosed alleyway. The camera moves forward past illuminated vending machines on the right, with a distinctive red building visible ahead. The space is flanked by modern architecture with overhead walkways visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban encampment with tents and steam vents

events.description: enters open area with homeless encampment and tents
passing through steam or smoke rising from vents near the tents

agents.ego_description: navigating through a makeshift tent city, weaving between temporary shelters

entered.detail: large military-style camouflage tent with gear scattered around
multi-level highway structure with green safety barriers
steam or smoke rising from industrial vents
smaller green camping tent with striped canopy

segments.scene_description: The alley opens into a wider area occupied by a homeless encampment with camouflage and green tents. Steam rises from vents near an elevated highway structure on the left. The ground is littered with cardboard and debris. The camera weaves through the temporary shelters toward a tunnel entrance.

events.description: enters dark tunnel from bright outdoor environment, visibility drops significantly
approaching tunnel exit, bright daylight becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: moving through a dimly lit concrete underpass with graffiti on the walls

entered.detail: rough concrete walls of the underpass with green graffiti
greenish fluorescent tube light mounted on the tunnel wall
scattered cardboard and trash littering the tunnel floor

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark, enclosed underpass tunnel with low greenish lighting from fluorescent tubes. The concrete walls are covered in graffiti and the floor is littered with debris. The segment progresses from darkness toward a bright exit where daylight and the street beyond become visible.

events.description: exits tunnel onto active city street with vehicle traffic
black van and pink car visible on the street, traffic moving
approaching crosswalk with pedestrians crossing the street

agents.ego_description: emerging from underpass and approaching a crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black van driving along the street from left to right
man in white tank top and green pants walking toward camera at crosswalk

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade
yellow and green painted pedestrian crossing lines on the street
tall metal scaffolding structure on the side of a building
pedestrian traffic signal showing green walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark tunnel into a bright, open urban intersection. Vehicles including a black van and pink car move along the street. The camera approaches a crosswalk where pedestrians are walking, including a man in a white tank top. Digital billboards and construction scaffolding dominate the background of this bustling city scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright urban plaza through a series of increasingly enclosed spaces before emerging into a bustling city intersection. It begins by ascending a wide concrete stairway flanked by modern buildings under a clear, sunny sky. As the camera reaches the top, the open air gives way to a narrow alleyway lined with illuminated vending machines, which then expands into a gritty encampment of camouflage tents and rising steam beneath an elevated highway. The scene shifts from this cluttered open area into the oppressive darkness of a graffiti-covered underpass lit by dim green fluorescent tubes. Finally, the camera pushes through the tunnel's exit, transitioning from the gloom into the vivid daylight of a crowded street filled with moving vehicles, pedestrians, and towering digital billboards.
